name: Salmon W/ Fennel, Orange, and Rosemary
directions: In a heavy pot, over medium low, get 1 tablespoon of oil warm. Add onion and fennel and sweat until soft, tender and sweet. Add rosemary leaves, cover and reduce to low.

Get a grill really hot and oil it. Massage salmon with 1 tablespoon of oil and salt and pepper. Grill salmon, skin side down for a few minutes, then flip. Cook until medium rare and remove to a plate.
Remove the skin and white from orange, and cut into wedges, toss with fennel.
Serve skin side up on a bed of fennel and orange.

similar.name: Grilled Salmon With Chive Sauce Dressing
Salmon for Those Who Don't Cook Fish!
Simple and Light Grilled Salmon With Lime Zest

name: Salmon Patties
directions: Drain Salmon and  carefully remove the bones. Use fork to cut into pieces.  Add Eggs, salt, pepper, and seasoning. Add crackers.  Mix.  Using your hands, form balls and flatten into patties (like a hamburger).  You can make them small or big.  I prefer a biscuit size.
In a large Sauce pan, get the oil (or shortening) hot.  Place the patties in the pan and fry to a golden brown on both sides.

similar.name: Salmon for Those Who Don't Cook Fish!

Simple and Light Grilled Salmon With Lime Zest

name: Captain's Tilapia
directions: Pre heat oven to 375 degrees F.
In a med saute pan (with a metal handle) spray with non stick cooking spray. Saute onions about 2-3 minutes until translucent.
Add tilapia filets on top of sauteed onions.
Add chopped garlic on each filet.
Add chopped fresh basil.
Add tomato slices or chopped tomatoes.
Place pan with topped filets in the oven.
Bake 12-15 minutes until fish is white.

Grilled Salmon With Chive Sauce Dressing

name: Guaranteed to Impress Shrimp Dip
directions: Chop it all up and mix it together, let chill completely before serving. I find it tastes best served with Frito's Scoops chips.

similar.name: Grilled Salmon With Chive Sauce Dressing

name: Salmon With Poppyseed Sauce
directions: Turn oven on to 350 degrees F. Season salmon steaks with garlic powder and seasoned salt. Line baking sheet with foil and spray cooking oil. Place the salmon in the pan, cover and put in oven for about 25 minutes. Remove from oven and pour poppy seed dressing over the salmon and place back in the over for about 5-10 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool for about 2 minutes.
This goes good with steamed rice and or yellow rice with any veggie.

similar.name: Salmon W/ Fennel, Orange, and Rosemary
Salmon for Those Who Don't Cook Fish!
Simple and Light Grilled Salmon With Lime Zest

name: Barbecue-Glazed Salmon
directions: Rub salmon with spice rub. Position oven rack 4 inches from broiler element and heat to high.
In a small bowl, whisk chili sauce, brown sugar, olive oil, lemon juice, ginger, cumin, and pepper until blended; set aside.

Coat a large broiler-proof nonstick skillet with olive-oil cooking spray and place over medium-high heat.  When skillet is hot, add salmon; cook 3 minutes undisturbed.  Turn fillets, cook 1 minute longer.  Remove skillet from heat and brush fillets with chili mixture.  Place skillet under broiler; broil 3-4 minutes, until salmon is glazed and shiny and just opaque in the thickest parts.

Salmon W/ Fennel, Orange, and Rosemary

name: Grilled Salmon With Chive Sauce Dressing
directions: In a food processor or blender, blend the ingredients to a smooth the mixture.

Generously coat the salmon filets with olive oil, salt and pepper to taste and place on a hot grill 6-8 minutes until they’ll turn without sticking. Cook the opposite side for 2- minutes until done. Plate the salmon hot off the grill and serve with the dressing spooned over the top.

name: Shrimp Woobie
directions: Mix the juice from 1 lemon with the next 3 ingredients.  Pour over the.
raw shelled shrimp and marinate for 1/2 hour.
In the meantime heat up the Alfredo sauce and keep warm.
Heat a frypan to medium-high and add the shrimp and the marinade.
Reduce heat to med-low and cook for 4 minutes (flipping over shrimp halfway).
Pour the contents into the alfredo sauce, mix, and serve with pasta or rice.

similar.name: Grilled Salmon With Chive Sauce Dressing

name: Simple and Light Grilled Salmon With Lime Zest
directions: Mix last 5 ingredients in a flat bottom container large enough to lay all Salmon Fillets on the bottom.
Place Rinsed and dried fillets flesh side down in marinade.  Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
Pre-heat grill on high.  Immediately before placing salmon on the grill turn heat down to medium and spray grate with oil.
Place salmon on grate flesh side down first.  Grill for 6 minutes and just before turning skin side down spray skin with oil.  Turn and grill another 6-8 minutes.

name: Salmon for Those Who Don't Cook Fish!
directions: Preheat oven to 400.
Cut up onion, peppers, mushroom and garlic, and place in a pan with a little olive oil.  Cook on medium until soft, and season with Mrs Dash Chicken Seasoning.

Rub a little olive oil in a pan / cast iron skillet and heat to high heat. Season the salmon with Mrs Dash Extra Spicy Seasoning, and place in pan skin side down.  Cook for 3 - 4 minutes until skin is crispy.
Flip fish over and transfer pan to oven.
Cook for 8 minutes.
Serve fish on top of grilled veggies, with sliced avocado along side.

name: Tilapia Alfredo
directions: Saute shrimp in a skillet with butter and minced garlic.
Add Alfredo sauce to the shrimp and reduce heat to simmer.
Heat up grill to 375 degrees.
Season fillets on both sides.
After grill is hot cook fish for 5-7 minutes,turn over once.
Pour sauce over fish and garnish with parsley.

similar.name: Salmon for Those Who Don't Cook Fish!

name: Orange Ginger Glazed Baked Salmon
directions: Preheat oven to 450°.
Line a shallow baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Place salmon filets on foil skin side down, the skin should stick to the foil and the fish come off beautifully when removing from the pan.
Mix ground ginger into the Kikkoman Orange Sauce and stir well.
Brush a light coat of sauce on the filets.
Bake for 5 minutes.
Add another layer of glaze sauce and bake for 10 minutes.
Add a final layer of glaze sauce and bake for 5 more minutes.
Test for doneness by using a fork to see if flaky and cooked through.
You can add cayenne pepper or crushed red pepper for heat or add sliced green onions to the top just before serving.
